title: The Prince Who Was a Thief
writer: Gerald Drayson Adams, Theodore Dreiser, Æneas MacKenzie
actors: Tony Curtis, Piper Laurie, Everett Sloane
plot: In 13th-century Tangiers, regent Mustapha hires a paid assassin to kill baby Prince Hussein in order to usurp his throne but the assassin has second thoughts and steals the baby for himself.
